content:
Apply: https://tally.so/r/2EZJQe

UNUC Legal LLP is pleased to announce its Selective Virtual Legal Internship Programme, commencing 1 August 2026, focused on Construction Arbitration & Infrastructure Disputes.

The four-week programme will provide a limited cohort with practical, case-based exposure to a simulated high-value EPC arbitration, covering Delay & EOT, RA Bill disputes, variations, prolongation claims, legal research and arbitration drafting.

Duration: 4 Weeks | Mode: Virtual
Participation: Limited Cohort | Selection Based
